mapper.select: SELECT id, payment_record_id, repayment_schedule_id, installment_number, allocated_principal, allocated_interest, allocated_total, allocation_rule, created_at FROM payment_allocation WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, payment_record_id, repayment_schedule_id, installment_number, allocated_principal, allocated_interest, allocated_total, allocation_rule, created_at FROM payment_allocation WHERE payment_record_id = #{paymentRecordId} ORDER BY installment_number ASC

SELECT id, payment_record_id, repayment_schedule_id, installment_number, allocated_principal, allocated_interest, allocated_total, allocation_rule, created_at FROM payment_allocation WHERE repayment_schedule_id = #{repaymentScheduleId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
